# Alwahaa Technical Services LLC

> Leading swimming pool contractor in Dubai with 15+ years of experience and 500+ completed projects across the UAE.

Alwahaa Technical Services LLC (ATS) designs and builds custom swimming pools, jacuzzis, water features, and landscapes for residential and commercial clients across Dubai and the UAE. Founded in 2008, headquartered in Deira, Dubai.

## Services

- Swimming Pool Construction (concrete, infinity, overflow, skimmer, rooftop, lap, plunge, fibreglass)
- Swimming Pool Maintenance (routine servicing, water chemistry, filtration, equipment)
- Jacuzzi & Spa Installation
- Water Features & Fountains
- Landscaping & Hardscaping (paving, decking, pergolas, gazebos, garden design)
- Pool Renovation & Repair (tile replacement, leak detection, equipment upgrades)

## Coverage Area

Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah — United Arab Emirates

## Pricing

- Residential pools: AED 50,000 – AED 500,000
- Commercial / luxury infinity pools: AED 500,000 – AED 2,000,000
- Free quotes available via WhatsApp or email

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2008
- Experience: 15+ years
- Projects completed: 500+
- Team: Multilingual (English, Arabic, Hindi)
- Licensed contractor in Dubai, UAE

## Contact

- Office: +971 4 255 2895

- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:30 PM (UAE time)
